title: うきうきショッピング

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Shopping for daily necessities complete.
Returning to the academy to begin preparations
for traini—

text_block_list.name: Sporting Goods Store Employee
text_block_list.text:
It's our grand reopening! Your efficiency will go
through the roof with the latest in our training
equipment! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Time remaining until training
begins—twenty-seven minutes, four seconds... an
adequate amount of time to verify the efficiency
of this equipment.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... I detect a five-percent increase in stimulation of abdominal muscles over normal levels when using this machine...

text_block_list.name: Sporting Goods Store Employee
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for trying it out! Our next product has a
proven ten-percent increase!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Time remaining until training begins—ten
seconds. Calculating the best course of action to
take.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Calculations complete. I have determined that
continued testing may increase my chances of
winning in the future.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
As a result, I predict Father and Trainer will be
pleased. Status—"cheerful."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
To achieve the best possible results, I would like
to request a trial run of all available equipment as
well as full data disclosure!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon tries out everything in the store
and ends up skipping her training.
